tasks.title: Project Kick-off & Architecture Design
tasks.description: Define overall system architecture, technology stack, and project scope.

tasks.title: UI/UX Design for Mobile App
tasks.description: Create wireframes, mockups, and user flows for the mobile application.

tasks.title: Database Schema Design
tasks.description: Design schemas for recipes, ingredients, user data, and other necessary entities.

tasks.title: Setup Backend API Framework
tasks.description: Initialize backend project, select framework, and configure basic server.

tasks.title: Setup Cloud Infrastructure
tasks.description: Provision cloud resources (e.g., compute, storage, networking) for backend and AI services.

tasks.title: Setup Database Infrastructure
tasks.description: Provision and configure database instances in the cloud environment.

tasks.title: Implement User Authentication/Authorization
tasks.description: Develop API endpoints and logic for user registration, login, and session management.

tasks.title: Implement Recipe Data Storage & Retrieval
tasks.description: Develop API endpoints for storing and retrieving recipe information from the database.

tasks.title: Implement Image Upload API Endpoint
tasks.description: Create an API endpoint to receive and securely store uploaded fridge photos.

tasks.title: Research & Select AI Models for Object Detection
tasks.description: Investigate existing models or decide on custom model approach for ingredient detection.

tasks.title: Data Acquisition & Preprocessing for AI Model
tasks.description: Gather and prepare image datasets for training the object detection model (e.g., ingredient images).

tasks.title: Train & Evaluate Object Detection Model
tasks.description: Train the selected AI model to identify various food items/ingredients in images and evaluate its performance.

tasks.title: Develop Ingredient Extraction & Normalization Logic
tasks.description: Implement logic to process object detection results, extract ingredient names, and normalize them against a known ingredient list.

tasks.title: Design & Implement Recipe Recommendation Engine
tasks.description: Develop algorithms to suggest recipes based on the extracted and available ingredients.

tasks.title: Deploy AI Models as API Service
tasks.description: Package and deploy the trained object detection and recommendation models as a scalable API service.

tasks.title: Integrate AI Service with Backend
tasks.description: Modify the backend to call the AI service with uploaded images and receive ingredient/recipe suggestions.

tasks.title: Setup Mobile App Project
tasks.description: Initialize mobile app project and configure development environment.

tasks.title: Implement Mobile Camera & Photo Capture
tasks.description: Develop functionality within the mobile app to access the device camera and capture photos.

tasks.title: Implement Mobile Image Upload to Backend
tasks.description: Develop functionality to upload captured photos from the mobile app to the backend API.

tasks.title: Implement Mobile User Authentication UI
tasks.description: Build UI for user registration, login, and profile management in the mobile app.

tasks.title: Implement Mobile Recipe Display UI
tasks.description: Design and implement the UI to display suggested recipes, including details and images.

tasks.title: Implement CI/CD Pipelines
tasks.description: Set up automated build, test, and deployment pipelines for backend, AI, and mobile components.

tasks.title: Setup Monitoring & Logging
tasks.description: Configure monitoring tools and centralized logging for all deployed services.

tasks.title: Develop Backend API Tests
tasks.description: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for all backend API endpoints.

tasks.title: Develop AI Model Evaluation & Integration Tests
tasks.description: Create tests to validate AI model performance and its integration with the backend.

tasks.title: Develop Mobile App UI & Integration Tests
tasks.description: Write UI tests and integration tests for the mobile application's features.

tasks.title: End-to-End System Testing
tasks.description: Perform comprehensive testing of the entire system from mobile app to backend and AI services.

tasks.title: Prepare for Mobile App Store Submission
tasks.description: Finalize app branding, metadata, screenshots, and adhere to platform guidelines for submission.

tasks.title: Deploy Backend & AI Services to Production
tasks.description: Execute final production deployment of backend and AI services using CI/CD.

tasks.title: Launch Mobile App to App Stores
tasks.description: Submit the mobile application to Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
